Tiny kitchen treasures are our favorite kind 💙🌾

This vintage Nanco “Delft” windmill salt cellar is giving cozy cottage kitchen energy with its blue-and-white windmill scene and wooden lid charm.

A little functional. A little collectible. A lot adorable.

✨ THIS OR THAT? ✨

One of the best parts of vintage hunting is finding pieces that feel completely different… but equally impossible to leave behind.

Would you choose:

💙 A — the charming Nanco “Delft” Salt Cellar with its cozy cottage feel and classic blue-and-white design

OR

💚 B — the striking Yalos Murano Cat Figurine with rich emerald glass and sleek mid-century vibes

We honestly can’t decide. Drop your pick below, A or B? 👀

🌹 A little glow, a lot of magic 🌹

This isn’t just glass… it’s a whole mood ❤️
Our Ruby Red Diamond Point Fairy Lamp by Viking Glass is here to steal the spotlight (and maybe your heart too).

Light it up and suddenly everything feels softer, warmer, a little more enchanted… like your space just whispered “stay awhile.” 🕯️🍓✨ And let’s be honest… ruby red hits different.
